sections.text: The following data is from the source URL and sections table: The source URL is <https://www.msjace-edu.in/nirf.php>, there are 7 sections covered.

sections.header: 1. NIRF Overview & NIRF 2026 + NIRF 2025 Document Links
sections.text:
The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) is a methodology adopted by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India, to rank institutions of higher education across the country. MSAJCE participates in NIRF rankings annually and submits data across three categories: Engineering, Overall, and Innovation.
The following data is from the NIRF 2026 Download Links table: NIRF 2026 Engineering download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2026.pdf. NIRF 2026 Overall download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2026.pdf. NIRF 2026 Innovation download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2026.pdf.
The following data is from the NIRF 2025 Download Links table: NIRF 2025 Engineering download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2025.pdf. NIRF 2025 Overall download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2025.pdf. NIRF 2025 Innovation download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-INNOV-2025.pdf.

sections.header: 2. NIRF 2024 & NIRF 2023 Links — Complete Year-wise Directory
sections.text:
The following data is from the NIRF 2024 — Download Links table: The NIRF 2024 Engineering category download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2024.pdf and the NIRF 2024 Overall category download URL is https://www.msjace-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2024.pdf.
The following data is from the NIRF 2023 — Download Links table: The NIRF 2023 Engineering category download URL is https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-ENGG-2023.pdf and the NIRF 2023 Overall category download URL is https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/nift/MSAJCE-OVERALL-2023.pdf.

The following data is from the table of NIRF document directory: In 2026, the Engineering PDF is MSAJCE-ENGG-2026.pdf, the Overall PDF is MSAJCE-OVERALL-2026.pdf, and the Innovation PDF is MSAJCE-INNOV-2026.pdf. In 2025, the Engineering PDF is MSAJCE-ENGG-2025.pdf, the Overall PDF is MSAJCE-OVERALL-2025.pdf, and the Innovation PDF is MSAJCE-INNOV-2025.pdf. In 2024, the Engineering PDF is MSAJCE-ENGG-2024.pdf, the Overall PDF is MSAJCE-OVERALL-2024.pdf, and the Innovation PDF is not listed. In 2023, the Engineering PDF is MSAJCE-ENGG-2023.pdf, the Overall PDF is MSAJCE-OVERALL-2023.pdf, and the Innovation PDF is not listed.

All NIRF PDFs are hosted at base URL: https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/nift/ with naming convention: MSAJCE-ENGG-YYYY.pdf, MSAJCE-OVERALL-YYYY.pdf, and MSAJCE-INNOV-YYYY.pdf. A total of 10 PDF documents are available across 4 years, from 2023 to 2026.

sections.header: 3. Related Accreditation Links & General Contact Information
sections.text:
The following data is from the Document / Page table: The NAAC Page is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/naac.php, the IQAC Page is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/iqac.php, and the NIRF Page is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/nirf.php. The ARIIA Certificate 2021 is located at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/ariia/ARIIA-2021-CERTIFICATE.pdf, the Anna University Approval is located at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/AnnaUnivApproval.pdf, and the AICTE Approval is located at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/AICTE-APPROVAL.pdf. The Code of Conduct can be found at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/naac/cdeofconduct.pdf, Best Practices are documented at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/naac/bestpractices.pdf, and the Mandatory Disclosure is available at http://msajce-edu.in/uploads/MandatoryDisclosure.pdf. The Institutional Distinctiveness is detailed at http://msajce-edu.in/uploads/naac/7.3/7.3LH.pdf, the Annual Report AY2023-2024 is at https://www.msjce-edu.in/uploads/aqar/AnnualReport2023-2024.pdf, and Online Admission information is at https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE.

The following data is from the table with no headers: Fee Payment information is available at https://www.feepayr.com/, Exam Results can be found at https://results.msjce-edu.in/, AICTE Scholarship Schemes are detailed at https://www.aicte.gov.in/schemes/students-development-schemes, and the Grievance Cell information is at https://www.msjce-edu.in/grievanceredressalcommittee.php.

The following data is from the MSJCE — General Contact Information table: The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. The phone number is +91 99400 04500, the email is msjce.office@gmail.com, and the website is www.msjce-edu.in. For grievances, contact grievance@msjce-edu.in, and for online admissions, visit https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE. The NAAC information is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/naac.php, the IQAC information is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/iqac.php, and the NIRF information is available at https://www.msjce-edu.in/nirf.php.
